name: Waste Connections, Inc.
description: Waste Connections, Inc. is a North American integrated waste services company that provides non-hazardous waste collection, transfer, disposal, and resource recovery services. Serving millions of residential, commercial, and industrial customers across the United States and Canada, the company focuses on providing reliable, environmentally responsible waste management solutions. In addition to its core solid waste operations, Waste Connections offers specialized services, including oilfield waste treatment and recycling, while maintaining a strong commitment to operational excellence and sustainable practices within the communities it serves. The company is headquartered in The Woodlands, Texas, and is incorporated in Ontario, Canada.
